AboutShopFallback: {0} is built as a clean, trustworthy furniture shopping experience: products are easy to scan, details are easy to understand, and the buying flow does not make users guess what to do next.
AboutStoryTitle: This is not just another store page.
AboutStoryLead: We treat this project like a real store translated into a web experience: products need to feel credible, navigation needs to stay smooth, and every visitor should understand what they are viewing, how to add it to cart, and where the checkout flow continues.
AboutStoryPoint1Body: Every screen is judged by practical questions: can users understand the product quickly, find the price, press the right action, and recover if they change their mind? Small details like cart state, button feedback, menus, and profile actions matter before any decorative polish.
AboutStoryPoint2Body: The 3D room should not exist just to look busy. It gives products context, helps visitors imagine items inside a space, and still keeps the interaction rhythm clear: view, place, add to cart, then return to the store without feeling lost.
AboutStoryPoint3Title: The code has to survive the demo
AboutStoryPoint3Body: A good-looking site that breaks on every click loses trust immediately. That is why we prioritize core flows such as catalog, cart, checkout, language switching, profile actions, and product data. The interface can keep improving, but the main path has to work first.
AboutStoryPoint4Title: Serious work, not a dry template
AboutStoryPoint4Body: The project still needs its own character: a more cinematic about page, a few surprises in the 3D room, and a store experience that does not feel like a random template. The goal is simple: it should look considered, feel usable, and make people want to keep exploring.

AiStylist.HeroDesc: Describe the room in your own words. Stylist will keep the context, select items currently on sale, and turn the consultation into a coordination that you can add to cart or try in 3D room.
AiStylist.VisualNote: Understand room first, pick items later
AiStylist.Step1Desc: Tell Stylist about your space, preferred style, budget, and priorities.
AiStylist.Step2Desc: AI analyzes your needs and picks the most suitable products from the active catalog.
AiStylist.Step3Desc: Add items to cart or try them in the 3D room to feel the space before buying.
AiStylist.SidebarStartDesc: Select your interaction mode with Stylist
AiStylist.SidebarCustomizeDesc: Options to help the AI assistant understand your room better (optional)
